events.text: Identified the condition as a defective sill flashing/WRB tape sequence — a reverse-lap installation error that violates the required shingle-style drainage sequence (sill pan → WRB → jambs → head flashing). Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, condition `installed-defective`/`non-compliant`, since it risks directing water into the wall assembly if closed in as-is, but is still correctable at this rough-complete stage.
